texto: Q: The Continuum didn't think you had it in you, Jean-Luc. But I knew you did...We wanted to see if you had the ability to expand your mind and your horizons. And for one brief moment, you did.Picard: When I realized the paradox.Q: Exactly. For that one fraction of a second, you were open to options you had never considered. That is the exploration that awaits you. Not mapping stars and studying nebula, but charting the unknown possibilities of existence.
explicacao: Citação de Brannon Braga sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Q: The Continuum didn't think you had it in you, Jean-Luc. But I knew you did...We wanted to see …” articula reflexao, existence, paradox em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e paradox.
